strengths: Broad full-stack and multi-platform engineering experience spanning ~17 years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Active engagement with AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective) demonstrating entrepreneurial and product ownership experience
concerns: No evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-organizational technical leadership commensurate with the role
AI/ML depth is shallow and very recent — no demonstrated history of building AI-powered products or platforms before 2025
Cloud expertise is limited to AWS CDK in one role; no evidence of cloud platform strategy, architecture at scale, or recognized cloud/AI thought leadership
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned software craftsman with genuine breadth across technologies and a strong TDD and engineering quality ethos, but the profile falls short of the director-level AI strategy role on the dimensions that matter most: he has no demonstrated history of shaping cloud or AI platform strategy, no advanced AI credentials, limited cloud depth, and no track record of advising strategic customers or leading organization-wide technical direction — all of which are central to this position rather than ancillary requirements.
